notes: v0.27.0 — Kit-style ship redesign live. All 16 hulls (4 per class × 4 classes) now render procedurally via the 5-layer mandala EVERYWHERE — lobby preview, mosaic tiles, in-arena player + opponent, LANCE decoy, COSMETICS, MODULES, shop, ship picker. Renamed to kit identities: SHARD = ASH/SOLSTICE/PRISM/PHANTOM, BASTION = AEGIS/GLADIATOR/HONEYCOMB/CATHEDRAL, LANCE = NEEDLE/RAZOR/NEON SCALPEL/VOID, CHORUS = HARMONY/WAVEFORM/GROVE/CHOIR. 2 free + 1 PULSE + 1 SURGE per class. Save IDs unchanged so unlocks carry over. Phase 2 next: themed trails + projectiles per kit, mixable across kits.
